text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer. It's okay. You don't have to keep
trying.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
We can still look at them through the glass case.
Besides, that was the initial plan, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You've proven your commitment, but we should
let the next person play now.
